status.restartWaitingTitle: Installation submitted. Waiting for Taco to restart
status.restartWaitingDescription: Taco is changing to normal runtime. This page will continue checking its status.
status.restartUnavailable: The restarted Taco is not reachable yet. Check the deployment process, then retry.

postgres.title: PostgreSQL
postgres.description: Enter the connection for Taco's primary database.

redis.title: Redis
redis.description: Enter the Taco-dedicated Redis instance. Username, password, and database number are optional. Installation clears every logical database in this instance.

administrator.title: Initial super administrator
administrator.description: This is the installation super administrator and is independent of business-role permissions. Its password must have at least 8 characters and cannot contain its username.

confirmation.title: Installation preview
confirmation.description: Confirm PostgreSQL, Redis, the initial super administrator, and advanced settings. Starting installation recreates the selected PostgreSQL public schema and runs FLUSHALL against the selected Taco-dedicated Redis instance, clearing every logical database before migration, encrypted configuration persistence, and restart.

advanced.title: Advanced settings
advanced.description: Optional. Open and fill these fields only when this installation needs advanced overrides. The preview shows only overrides that will be submitted.

validation.port: Port must be an integer between 1 and 65535
validation.redisDatabase: Redis database number must be a non-negative integer
validation.positive: This field must be a positive integer
